html:
Exclusive to:

“Can Row in water to move a boat in a desired direction.”

-

The Oar is a craftable Item in the Seafaring Filter, exclusive to Don't Starve Together, and introduced in Return of Them. It requires a Log to craft. An Oar can be used to move a Boat or other Floating Platforms across the Ocean.

If used inconsistently (too little time between uses), the player will be splashed with water and gain 9 , while the Oar will lose an amount of durability that is equivalent to 25 uses.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

Woven - Classy
Pantomimed Collection
Pantomimed Oar
Convey an incredibly convincing impression of an oar.
Woven - Distinguished
Swamp Collection
Paddlefish Oar
Paddle like a fish.

Trivia

  • Both types of Oars were introduced in the Turn of Tides update.
  • Oars were moved from the Think Tank to always available in the March 2022 QoL update.

Assets

OarPaddlefish Oar

  • Dropped

  • Dropped
  • Equipped

If used inconsistently (too little time between uses), the player will be splashed with water and gain 9 , while the Oar will lose an amount of durability that is equivalent to 25 uses.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Mái Chèo là một Vật phẩm có thể chế tạo được trong Bộ Lọc Đi Biển, độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, và được giới thiệu trong Return of Them. Nó yêu cầu Nhật ký để chế tạo. Mái chèo có thể được sử dụng để di chuyển Thuyền hoặc các Bệ nổi khác trên Đại dương.
